Class MedicationStats

java.lang.Object
pojos.MedicationStats
public class MedicationStats extends Object
POJO class representing the statistical data for a specific medication. Used for analytics and reporting functionalities.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MedicationStats()
    Default constructor for MedicationStats.
    MedicationStats(String medicationId, String medicationName, int quantitySold, double totalRevenue, double totalCost, double totalProfit, double profitMargin)
    Parameterized constructor for MedicationStats.

  • Constructor Details

    • MedicationStats

      public MedicationStats()
      Default constructor for MedicationStats.

    • MedicationStats

      public MedicationStats(String medicationId, String medicationName, int quantitySold, double totalRevenue, double totalCost, double totalProfit, double profitMargin)
      Parameterized constructor for MedicationStats.
      Parameters:
      medicationId - The unique identifier for the medication.
      medicationName - The name of the medication.
      quantitySold - The total quantity of the medication sold.
      totalRevenue - The total revenue generated from sales.
      totalCost - The total cost of purchasing the medication.
      totalProfit - The total profit generated.
      profitMargin - The profit margin represented as a percentage.
